meanings.definition: a demonstration of approval by clapping the hands together

examples: The judge clapped him in jail

meanings.definition: cause to strike the air in flight
examples: The big bird clapped its wings

meanings.definition: clap one's hands or shout after performances to indicate approval

examples: The children were clapping to the music
the wings of the birds clapped loudly

meanings.definition: strike with the flat of the hand; usually in a friendly way, as in encouragement or greeting
strike together so as to produce a sharp percussive noise
